## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between HockeyStack and GrowthX for content strategy and AI-driven growth initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/FK_x1ay2tg7ySn38EN7yL47jD4ZBLdBh?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers comprehensive content and SEO services, leveraging AI workflows and human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/FK_x1ay2tg7ySn38EN7yL47jD4ZBLdBh?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
  - [HockeyStack seeks to improve content strategy, reduce ad spend, and explore innovative content approaches](https://fathom.video/share/FK_x1ay2tg7ySn38EN7yL47jD4ZBLdBh?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
  - [GrowthX's pricing starts at $9,000/month, including strategy development and content production](https://fathom.video/share/FK_x1ay2tg7ySn38EN7yL47jD4ZBLdBh?tab=summary&timestamp=1445.0)
  - [60-day strategy phase followed by 12-month engagement, with flexibility and potential for custom solutions](https://fathom.video/share/FK_x1ay2tg7ySn38EN7yL47jD4ZBLdBh?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)

## Topics

### HockeyStack's Current Marketing Landscape

  - [Strong social media presence and outbound team](https://fathom.video/share/FK_x1ay2tg7ySn38EN7yL47jD4ZBLdBh?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [Heavy reliance on paid ads (LinkedIn, Google) with diminishing returns](https://fathom.video/share/FK_x1ay2tg7ySn38EN7yL47jD4ZBLdBh?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
  - [SEO efforts with consultant for 7-8 months, but low quantity and slow results](https://fathom.video/share/FK_x1ay2tg7ySn38EN7yL47jD4ZBLdBh?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [Exploring AI-driven content strategies to reach new audiences (ChatGPT, Perplexity Cloud)](https://fathom.video/share/FK_x1ay2tg7ySn38EN7yL47jD4ZBLdBh?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
  - [Previous manual Template Library initiative, seeking scalable alternative](https://fathom.video/share/FK_x1ay2tg7ySn38EN7yL47jD4ZBLdBh?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)

### GrowthX's Offering and Approach

  - [AI-powered content creation workflows combined with human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/FK_x1ay2tg7ySn38EN7yL47jD4ZBLdBh?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)
  - [Comprehensive content strategy development and execution](https://fathom.video/share/FK_x1ay2tg7ySn38EN7yL47jD4ZBLdBh?tab=summary&timestamp=766.0)
  - [Weekly calibration and collaboration with client teams](https://fathom.video/share/FK_x1ay2tg7ySn38EN7yL47jD4ZBLdBh?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
  - [Custom solutions for unique client needs (e.g., podcast repurposing for Galileo AI)](https://fathom.video/share/FK_x1ay2tg7ySn38EN7yL47jD4ZBLdBh?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
  - [Focus on producing high-quality, contextually relevant content that performs well in both SEO and AI-driven search](https://fathom.video/share/FK_x1ay2tg7ySn38EN7yL47jD4ZBLdBh?tab=summary&timestamp=1271.0)

### Content Production and Quality Assurance

  - [Rigorous research process using AI to analyze multiple sources](https://fathom.video/share/FK_x1ay2tg7ySn38EN7yL47jD4ZBLdBh?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
  - [Human editors review and refine content for quality and relevance](https://fathom.video/share/FK_x1ay2tg7ySn38EN7yL47jD4ZBLdBh?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
  - [Style guides and benchmarking to maintain consistent quality](https://fathom.video/share/FK_x1ay2tg7ySn38EN7yL47jD4ZBLdBh?tab=summary&timestamp=1007.0)
  - [Emphasis on creating unique, comprehensive, and useful content](https://fathom.video/share/FK_x1ay2tg7ySn38EN7yL47jD4ZBLdBh?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)

### Pricing and Engagement Model

  - [Starting at $9,000/month for a comprehensive workstream](https://fathom.video/share/FK_x1ay2tg7ySn38EN7yL47jD4ZBLdBh?tab=summary&timestamp=1445.0)
  - [Includes \~50,000 words/month, strategy development, and execution](https://fathom.video/share/FK_x1ay2tg7ySn38EN7yL47jD4ZBLdBh?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)
  - [60-day strategy and shaping phase, followed by 12-month engagement](https://fathom.video/share/FK_x1ay2tg7ySn38EN7yL47jD4ZBLdBh?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)
  - [Flexibility to adapt and expand scope based on client needs](https://fathom.video/share/FK_x1ay2tg7ySn38EN7yL47jD4ZBLdBh?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)

### Additional Value-Adds

  - [Upcoming platform access for clients to run custom workflows](https://fathom.video/share/FK_x1ay2tg7ySn38EN7yL47jD4ZBLdBh?tab=summary&timestamp=1412.0)
  - [Potential for custom strategy sprints for unique initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/FK_x1ay2tg7ySn38EN7yL47jD4ZBLdBh?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
  - [Transparent pricing and flexible engagement terms](https://fathom.video/share/FK_x1ay2tg7ySn38EN7yL47jD4ZBLdBh?tab=summary&timestamp=1445.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send contract and engagement details to Emir](https://fathom.video/share/FK_x1ay2tg7ySn38EN7yL47jD4ZBLdBh?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide reference(s) for Emir to speak with](https://fathom.video/share/FK_x1ay2tg7ySn38EN7yL47jD4ZBLdBh?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)
  - [Emir to review invitation for GrowthX's office launch party](https://fathom.video/share/FK_x1ay2tg7ySn38EN7yL47jD4ZBLdBh?tab=summary&timestamp=1627.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up discussion after Emir reviews materials and speaks with references](https://fathom.video/share/FK_x1ay2tg7ySn38EN7yL47jD4ZBLdBh?tab=summary&timestamp=1652.0)
